news.t: XRP ETF inflows are rising even as token price falls: here's why

overview.description: The Volatility Shares Trust XRP 2X ETF (XRPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long xrp, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed fund, offering 2x the daily price participation in XRP using near-term futures and XRP-linked instruments. The fund does not directly invest in XRP XRPT was launched on May 22, 2025 and is issued by Volatility Shares.

data.title: XRP ETF inflows are rising even as token price falls: here's why
data.text: XRP's spot ETFs are sucking in roughly $50 million a day in fresh capital, hitting nearly $1 billion in inflows in under four weeks, the fastest adoption pace since Ethereum ETFs launched. Yet the tok...
